description: Speakers disagree through Monday and multiple Tuesday time proposals before compromising on Tuesday 11:30 AM for the release planning meeting.

events.title: Release Planning Meeting
events.reasoning: After Monday is rejected by Bob and Carol, and 11 AM Tuesday is negotiated but then deferred, all three speakers settle on Tuesday at 11:30 AM for 2 hours (until 1:30 PM) in meeting room B.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 1 event after extended negotiation: release planning meeting on Tuesday at 11:30 AM.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Tuesday=Feb 24. Monday was rejected. 11 AM was considered but replaced by 11:30 AM. The final agreed time is 11:30 AM to 1:30 PM.
